references.title: UI refresh
references.borrowed: Calm chrome, restrained contrast, and serious information density for the thread list and masthead.
references.rejected: Did not copy issue-tracker metaphors, dark default surfaces, or Linear-specific inbox framing.

references.title: Welcome to the new Linear
references.borrowed: Higher density with clearer hierarchy between navigation, worklist, and active review surface.
references.rejected: Did not use product-marketing polish or route-local branding gestures.

references.title: Nested Layouts
references.borrowed: Persistent shell chrome and child-route continuity without route flicker.
references.rejected: Did not mirror Vercel's dashboard IA or project navigation model.

references.title: New dashboard navigation available
references.borrowed: Efficient peer-route navigation and continuity-friendly section chrome.
references.rejected: Did not add dashboard-specific project switching or a floating mobile bar.

references.title: Data table
references.borrowed: Compact row scanning, disciplined search and toolbar behavior, and dense but readable operational layout.
references.rejected: Did not turn message repair into a generic table-only admin console.

references.title: Content guide
references.borrowed: Plain-spoken, service-grade wording for risk, repair, and fallback explanations.
references.rejected: Avoided shorthand or abstract product language that would blur message consequences.

references.title: Typography
references.borrowed: Disciplined hierarchy and readable density for long evidence chains and route facts.
references.rejected: Did not import NHS branding or public-service page composition directly.

references.title: Timeline
references.borrowed: Clear vertical chronology markers for the message evidence ladder and grouped event flow.
references.rejected: Did not use a generic activity-feed pattern because the local truth model requires explicit dispatch, evidence, and gate separation.
